news.headline: 27 straight wins: The most dominant stretch of LeBron James' career
news.description: When was LeBron James' peak? There's an argument to be made for 2013, when his Miami Heat did not lose for 52 straight days.

news.headline: LaMelo Ball has 30 points and 13 assists as Hornets beat short-handed Heat 136-106
news.description: — LaMelo Ball had 30 points and 13 assists, and the Charlotte Hornets pulled away in a huge fourth quarter to beat the short-handed Miami Heat 136-106 on Tuesday night.

news.headline: Banchero scores 27, Magic top Heat 121-117 and move to 5-0 vs. Miami this season
news.description: — Paolo Banchero scored 27 points, Desmond Bane added 21 and the Orlando Magic beat the Miami Heat 121-117 on Saturday night, becoming the second team in the last 30 years to beat the same opponent five times in one season.

news.headline: Bam Adebayo's AAU coach weighs in on historic 83-point performance
news.description: Ty White said his former high school star did something to wow him every game, but even this performance has him stunned.

news.headline: Heat troll Bucks after Milwaukee references Bam Adebayo's 83-point night
news.description: Miami responded online after Milwaukee brought up the Heat star's historic scoring performance.

news.headline: Pelle Larsson scores 28, Bam Adebayo adds 21 and Heat top Bucks 112-105 for 7th consecutive win
news.description: — Bam Adebayo scored 21 points in the game following his 83-point performance, Pelle Larsson had a career-high 28 points and the Miami Heat beat the Milwaukee Bucks 112-105 on Thursday night for their season-best seventh consecutive victory.

news.headline: Spoelstra doesn’t apologize for how Bam's 83-point game played out
news.description: Heat coach Erik Spoelstra doesn't care about the criticism surrounding Bam Adebayo's 83-point game.

data_facts.title: 6-2 Over the Last Two Weeks
data_facts.body: Miami has gone 6-2 over the past 14 days, sitting at 38-31 on the season. The Heat are the 7th seed in the Eastern Conference.

data_facts.title: 7th Seed in the East
data_facts.body: Miami holds the 7th seed in the Eastern Conference with a 38-31 record (0.551), 11.5 games back of first. Current streak: L2.

data_facts.title: On a 2-Game Losing Streak
data_facts.body: The Heat are currently on a 2-game losing streak. Miami has lost their last 2 game(s) and will look to bounce back in upcoming matchups.

data_facts.title: +26-Point Blowout vs BKN
data_facts.body: Miami's biggest win of the last 14 days was a 26-point blowout of BKN on 2026-03-03 (124-98). The Heat posted an offensive rating of 129.7 in that game.

data_facts.title: Tough 30-Point Loss vs Charlotte Hornets
data_facts.body: Miami's worst defeat in the last 14 days was a 30-point loss to Charlotte Hornets on 2026-03-17 (106-136). Miami's defensive rating ballooned to 130.9 in that game.

data_facts.title: 3-Point Shooting Running Cold
data_facts.body: Miami is shooting 33.5% from three over the last 14 days, below their season average of 35.6% (delta: -2.1%). Improved perimeter shooting could be key for a deeper playoff run.

data_facts.title: Offense Surging at 122.9 ORtg Over 14 Days
data_facts.body: Miami's offensive rating over the last 14 days is 122.9, up 4.9 points from their season average of 118.0. The defensive rating sits at 113.0 (better than the season avg of 114.1).

data_facts.title: Home: 5-1 | Road: 1-1 (Last 14 Days)
data_facts.body: Miami has been a fortress at home, going 5-1 in their last 6 home games. On the road they are 1-1 over the same stretch.

data_facts.title: Elite Defense vs BKN: 94.3 DRtg
data_facts.body: Miami's best defensive performance in the last 14 days came against BKN on 2026-03-03, holding their opponent to a defensive rating of 94.3. Miami won 124-98 in that game.

data_facts.title: Bam Adebayo Averaging 29.5 PPG Over 14 Days
data_facts.body: Bam Adebayo leads Miami with 29.5 points per game over the last 14 days (8 games), above their season average of 20.0 PPG (+9.5).

data_facts.title: Bam Adebayo Drops 83 Points
data_facts.body: Bam Adebayo had the standout individual performance of the stretch, dropping 83 points, 9 rebounds, and 3 assists on 2026-03-10. Their season average is 20.0 PPG.

data_facts.title: Season-High Offensive Output: 150 Points
data_facts.body: Miami lit up the scoreboard against WAS on 2026-03-10, putting up 150 points on a True Shooting percentage of 0.647 and an offensive rating of 133.6.
